html:
2026-0551
2026-06-04TCCanadian Navigable Waters ActOrder Exempting Certain Navigable Waters Located in Newfoundland and Labrador from the Application of Sections 22 and 23 of the Canadian Navigable Waters ActOrder exempting certain navigable waters located in Newfoundland and Labrador from the application of sections 22 and 23 of the Canadian Navigable Waters Act in order to permit the deposit of materials into, and dewatering of, the thirteen (13) navigable waters to facilitate mining operations.Registration: SOR/2026-0111 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Order Exempting Certain Navigable Waters Located in Newfoundland and Labrador from the Application of Sections 22 and 23 of the Canadian Navigable Waters Act
precis: Order exempting certain navigable waters located in Newfoundland and Labrador from the application of sections 22 and 23 of the Canadian Navigable Waters Act in order to permit the deposit of materials into, and dewatering of, the thirteen (13) navigable waters to facilitate mining operations.
